message:
fix(vc_cli,vc_store): minor cleanups from fresh-eyes review

vc_cli/src/lib.rs:4401:
  Arc::from(bytes.as_slice()) clones the slice into a new Arc<[u8]>
  allocation. Vec<u8> → Arc<[u8]> has a direct From impl that moves
  the buffer into the Arc without copying, which is what we actually
  want here since `bytes` is the consumed `DuckValue::Blob` payload.

vc_store/src/lib.rs:
  Backtick `DuckDB` and `FrankenSQLite` everywhere they appear in
  prose so the doc-comment passes clippy::doc_markdown (the lint
  treats CamelCase product names as bare identifiers and demands
  backticks). No semantic change to the documentation.

Verified `cargo clippy -p vc_store --all-targets -- -D warnings`
passes clean after the doc fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4398,7 +4398,7 @@ fn duck_value_to_sqlite_value(
         DuckValue::Float(number) => SqliteValue::Float(f64::from(number)),
         DuckValue::Double(number) => SqliteValue::Float(number),
         DuckValue::Text(text) => SqliteValue::Text(text.into()),
-        DuckValue::Blob(bytes) => SqliteValue::Blob(Arc::from(bytes.as_slice())),
+        DuckValue::Blob(bytes) => SqliteValue::Blob(Arc::from(bytes)),
         DuckValue::Timestamp(unit, value) => {
             SqliteValue::Text(format_timestamp(unit, value)?.into())
         }
